name: IdsDmProdBnfVndrDel

text.value: WITH xfm_Businesslogic AS (SELECT @{pipeline().parameters.RunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO) DELETE T FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ClmMartOwner}.PROD_DM_BNF_VNDR T JOIN xfm_Businesslogic X ON 1=1 WHERE T.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO <> X.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO

Description:

JOB NAME:     WebDMLastUpd

DESCRIPTION:     Each delete statement looks for run cycle is older than the current run cycle.  These rows were not update with the current process so they don't exist in the source system anymore.
